title: Fetch Top News Sites
text:
- fetch sites, select top news worthy attention.
  - Fetch https://www.cnn.com/
  - Fetch https://www.bbc.com/news
  - Fetch https://www.washingtonpost.com/
  - Fetch https://www.theguardian.com/
  - Fetch https://www.foxnews.com/
  - Fetch https://www.npr.org/

  - Fetch https://www.reuters.com/
  - Fetch https://www.nytimes.com/
  - Fetch https://www.wsj.com/
  - Fetch https://www.politico.com
- Build big applet HTML dashboard, use tags to see new type and use marking which site it came from.

title: Build A News Dashboard App
text:
- Search famous news sites.
- Fetch them
- Provide news dashboard applet HTML

title: Compare AMD and MU Stock Prices
text:
- DO NOT USE etrade_account tool
  - find AMD price
  - find MU price
- create a table featuring AMD and MU prices

title: Solar System SVG Visualization With Orbits
text:
- Generate a horizontal SVG visualization of the solar system with the Sun centered and 8 concentric circular orbits
- Calculate the approximate orbital phase angles for all 8 planets based on the current date
- Render the Sun as a bright yellow/orange circle and the 8 planets on their respective orbits using distinct colors and simplified relative sizing (Mercury smallest, Jupiter largest, subtle differences)

title: AMD May 2026 Option Delta Filter
text:
- get AMD current price and option expiration dates for May 2026
- fetch AMD call option chain for the earliest May expiry, set strikePriceNear 15% above current price, save to file
- read the saved CSV, filter to delta less than 0.30, output markdown table with strike, bid, ask, delta, theta, gamma, IV
